title: The Countdown Tightens
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on the countdown tightens, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Countdown Tightens. Luffy comes back for another fight with Crocodile, now armed with the will to keep standing. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Am I wrong!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The design system is

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Ohh,

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: An excellent judgment, princess...!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The proper course of action is still the same thing you should have done from the start!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: This whole fabricated rebellion must be stopped!

dialogue.speaker: Miss All Sunday
dialogue.text: And that's something only you can do!

dialogue.speaker: King Cobra
dialogue.text: And do you really think,

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: that I'll just stand by and let you do that...?

dialogue.speaker: Chaka
dialogue.text: Chaka!

dialogue.speaker: King Cobra
dialogue.text: I am this country's guardian deity...

dialogue.speaker: Chaka
dialogue.text: The jackall

dialogue.speaker: King Cobra
dialogue.text: The one that destroys,

dialogue.speaker: King Cobra
dialogue.text: The enemies of the royal family...!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: As long as I have even one breath left in me,

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Then I will use it to fight!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: ...And that,

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Is exactly what stupidity is.

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Princess! Kouza! Run now and do what you must!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: The first time I was in the

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: I still have enough strength to hold him off for a little while...!

dialogue.speaker: Miss All Sunday
dialogue.text: Got it!

dialogue.speaker: Chaka
dialogue.text: Chaka!

dialogue.speaker: King Cobra
dialogue.text: What the hell! That's not fair, go easy on me a little!

dialogue.speaker: King Cobra
dialogue.text: Such a fickle child. weren't you the one who begged me to train you?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: 2nd Royal Squadron Reporting to Main Forces!

dialogue.speaker: Pell
dialogue.text: 2nd Royal Squadron Reporting to Main Forces!

dialogue.speaker: Chaka
dialogue.text: The 4th line has been broken through!

dialogue.speaker: King Cobra
dialogue.text: The rebels are now making their way past the central square,

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: And are heading towards the northern block! They'll be at the Palace soon!

summary: This part develops the countdown tightens and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
